; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_clamp
define i32 @InputKt_clamp(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1, i32 %arg2) {
entry:
  %t0 = call i32 @InputKt_min(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg2)
  %t1 = call i32 @InputKt_max(i32 %arg1, i32 %t0)
  ret i32 %t1
}

; @InputKt_max
define i32 @InputKt_max(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_5 = alloca i32
  %t0 = icmp sgt i32 %arg0, %arg1
  br i1 %t0, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  store i32 %arg0, ptr %merge_5
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  store i32 %arg1, ptr %merge_5
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t1 = load i32, ptr %merge_5
  ret i32 %t1
}

; @InputKt_min
define i32 @InputKt_min(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_5 = alloca i32
  %t0 = icmp slt i32 %arg0, %arg1
  br i1 %t0, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  store i32 %arg0, ptr %merge_5
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  store i32 %arg1, ptr %merge_5
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t1 = load i32, ptr %merge_5
  ret i32 %t1
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 3
  %t1 = add i32 0, 7
  %t2 = call i32 @InputKt_min(i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 3
  %t5 = add i32 0, 7
  %t6 = call i32 @InputKt_max(i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t6)
  %t8 = add i32 0, 5
  %t9 = add i32 0, 1
  %t10 = add i32 0, 10
  %t11 = call i32 @InputKt_clamp(i32 %t8, i32 %t9, i32 %t10)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t11)
  %t13 = add i32 0, -5
  %t14 = add i32 0, 0
  %t15 = add i32 0, 100
  %t16 = call i32 @InputKt_clamp(i32 %t13, i32 %t14, i32 %t15)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t16)
  %t18 = add i32 0, 200
  %t19 = add i32 0, 0
  %t20 = add i32 0, 100
  %t21 = call i32 @InputKt_clamp(i32 %t18, i32 %t19, i32 %t20)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t21)
  ret i32 0
}
